extension.description: Trusted VS Code task board for Electron2D projects.
capability.untrusted: The extension launches the project-local e2d CLI and therefore requires workspace trust.
capability.virtual: Electron2D task boards require a local filesystem and CLI.
viewContainer.title: Task Board
view.name: Tasks
configuration.title: Electron2D Task Board
configuration.cliPath.description: Absolute path to e2d. When empty, the extension resolves e2d from PATH.
